digest.en: Tensions in the Middle East are dominating headlines, with the Strait of Hormuz shut and US-Iran tensions escalating. US President Trump has ordered the military to "shoot and kill" Iranian boats mining the strait. Israel and Lebanon have agreed to extend their ceasefire by three weeks.
digest.hi: अमेरिकी नौसेना ने पश्चिम एशिया में अपनी बड़ी तैनाती की है, जिसमें यूएसएस बुश खाड़ी में पहुंचा है। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने इस्राइल-लेबनान के बीच तीन हफ्तों के लिए संघर्ष विराम की घोषणा की है। संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने आगाह किया है कि ईरान युद्ध तीन करोड़ लोगों को फिर से गरीबी के गर्त में धकेल देगा।

articles.title: Ubisoft turns to Assassin's Creed ‘Black Flag’ remake, led by Singapore studio, to steady the ship
articles.summary: Ubisoft Singapore develops "Black Flag Resynced" with updated visuals and new features. Primarily developed by Ubisoft Singapore, "Black Flag Resynced" will include updated visuals, new gameplay features, and an extended storyline, Ubisoft said.

articles.title: Oil rises as Iran war worries keep markets on edge as Strait of Hormuz stays shut
articles.summary: Oil prices rise due to Iran war concerns and Strait of Hormuz closure. Oil rises as Iran war worries keep markets on edge as Strait of Hormuz stays shut CNBC.

articles.title: Trump Says Israel and Lebanon Agree to Extend Cease-Fire
articles.summary: Trump extended the Israel and Lebanon cease-fire for three more weeks to advance a peace agreement in Iran. The president said the truce in Lebanon would last three more weeks.

articles.title: Trump orders U.S. military to 'shoot and kill' Iranian boats mining Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: US President Trump ordered the military to shoot and kill Iranian boats mining the Strait of Hormuz. The move comes amid escalating tensions between the US and Iran. Live updates: Trump orders U. S.

articles.title: Israel retaliates against Hezbollah missile launch after ceasefire extension
articles.summary: Israel retaliates against Hezbollah after a missile launch from Lebanon. Hezbollah said it had launched rockets toward Israel in retaliation for an Israeli strike on the Lebanese village of Yater.

articles.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by 3 weeks following White House peace talks, Trump says
articles.summary: The Israel-Lebanon ceasefire has been extended by three weeks, US President Trump announced. The agreement follows a White House meeting between Israeli and Lebanese officials. Live Updates: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended by 3 weeks following White House peace talks, Trump says CBS News.

articles.title: Trump makes Strait of Hormuz claim and fuel price admission - as Lebanon ceasefire extended
articles.summary: Trump comments on Strait of Hormuz and fuel prices amid Lebanon ceasefire. Iran war latest: Trump makes Strait of Hormuz claim and fuel price admission - as Lebanon ceasefire extended Sky News.

articles.title: Trump says Lebanon and Israel agree to extend Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire by 3 weeks
articles.summary: Israel and Lebanon extend ceasefire by 3 weeks after a missile launcher strike. Israel says it struck Hezbollah missile launcher in Lebanon that had fired into Israel. Trump says Lebanon and Israel agree to extend Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire by 3 weeks.

articles.title: UN General Assembly President Annalena Baerbock to visit India next week
articles.summary: UN General Assembly President Annalena Baerbock will visit India next week, holding bilateral meetings with government officials and meeting the UN country team led by Stefan Priesner. Her visit includes multiple meetings with various officials.

articles.title: Child vaccine catch-up drive on course to hit target: UN
articles.summary: The UN reports that the child vaccine catch-up drive is on track to meet its target. The initiative aims to vaccinate children who missed their scheduled vaccinations. Child vaccine catch-up drive on course to hit target: UN France 24.

articles.title: Dollar set for weekly gain on stalled US-Iran talks and Middle East uncertainty
articles.summary: The dollar is poised for a weekly gain due to stalled US-Iran talks and uncertainty in the Middle East. The currency's value has been influenced by geopolitical tensions. Dollar set for weekly gain on stalled US-Iran talks and Middle East uncertainty.

articles.title: "Clock Ticking For Iran": Trump Says US "In No Rush" To End Iran War
articles.summary: A US aircraft carrier has joined two already operating in the Gulf, amid rising tensions with Iran. The deployment was reported in a live update on US-Iran war news. US-Iran War News Live Update:.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny top Spotify's first all-time most streamed artists list
articles.summary: Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny top Spotify's list of most streamed artists. Drake ranks third on the list. Drake comes in at third place. Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny top Spotify's first all-time most streamed artists list.

articles.title: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
articles.summary: A White House memo claims Chinese firms are stealing US AI technology. The memo alleges that companies mainly in China are wrongfully obtaining US AI models. A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.

articles.title: Meta plans 10% layoffs as AI spending soars: Source
articles.summary: US tech giant Meta plans to lay off about 8,000 employees next month, leaving thousands of positions unfilled, according to a source. The layoffs come as the company increases spending on artificial intelligence.

articles.title: US soldier involved in Maduro raid charged over alleged bets on capture
articles.summary: A US soldier involved in the January capture of Venezuelan president Nicolás Maduro has been charged with allegedly making over $400,000 on wagers about the politician's removal from office. The soldier could face up to 60 years in prison.

articles.title: Lebanon truce extended; Trump says time not on Tehran’s side
articles.summary: Lebanon's truce has been extended, but the death toll from Israel's ongoing conflict in Gaza continues to rise, with 72,568 fatalities and 172,338 injured, according to Gaza's Health Ministry. The toll has been reported since the start of the war.

articles.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon agree to extend ceasefire by 3 weeks
articles.summary: Blasts were reported over Tehran, prompting Iran to activate its air defenses. Iran had previously stated it wouldn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz as long as the US blockades its ports.

articles.title: Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire extended by 3 weeks, says Trump
articles.summary: US President Trump announced a three-week extension to the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire, following a high-level negotiation at the White House. The agreement marks the second such deal between Israel and Lebanon in a week.

articles.title: US professors sue university over arrest during pro-Palestine protest
articles.summary: Two US professors, including a philosophy professor, have sued their university for failing to protect them during a crackdown on pro-Palestine protests. The professors claim the university did not provide adequate support.

articles.title: US soldier charged with using Polymarket to bet on Nicolas Maduro abduction
articles.summary: A US soldier has been charged with using a betting platform to make over $400,000 from insider knowledge of the Venezuela attack that captured president Nicolás Maduro in January. The soldier allegedly made the bets on the platform Polymarket.

articles.title: पश्चिम एशिया में तनाव के बीच अमेरिकी नौसेना की बड़ी तैनाती, खाड़ी पहुंचा USS बुश
articles.summary: अमेरिकी नौसेना ने खाड़ी में USS बुश विमानवाहक पोत तैनात किया है। यह तैनाती होर्मुज जलसंधि में बढ़ते तनाव के बीच हुई है। अब खाड़ी में तीन अमेरिकी युद्धपोत मौजूद हैं।

articles.summary: खाड़ी देश तेल-गैस निर्यात के लिए होर्मुज जलडमरूमध्य से इतर रास्तों की तलाश कर रहे हैं। वे नए मार्ग बनाने की दिशा में काम कर रहे हैं। West Asia: होर्मुज से इतर रास्तों की तलाश में तेल-गैस निर्यातक, नए मार्ग बनाने की दिशा में बढ़ रहे खाड़ी देश।

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरान से जंग खत्म करने की जल्दबाजी नहीं, बातचीत जारी; परमाणु हथियार के इस्तेमाल पर क्या

articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र सहायता मिशन ने दक्षिणी लेबनान का दौरा किया। मिशन को हर क़दम पर तबाही के चिन्ह दिखाई दिए। यह दौरा क्षेत्र में शांति और स्थिरता की स्थिति का आकलन करने के लिए किया गया था।

articles.title: ईरान जंग के कारण महंगे हो सकते हैं कंडोम
articles.summary: ईरान और जंग के कारण कंडोम की मांग 30% बढ़ गई है। कंडोम बनाने वाली सबसे बड़ी कंपनी के सीईओ ने बताया कि ईरान जंग के कारण कंडोम के उत्पादन पर असर पड़ा है।

articles.title: भारत ने संरा महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार के लक्ष्यों पर सवाल किए
articles.summary: भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र महासचिव पद की उम्मीदवार क्रिस्टोफ बाचेलेत से सुरक्षा परिषद सुधार पर सवाल किए. भारत ने उनसे सुरक्षा परिषद में सुधार के लक्ष्यों और उद्देश्यों पर स्पष्टता मांगी. यह सवाल भारत की सुरक्षा परिषद में स्थायी सीट की मांग के बीच उठाया गया.
